statement.en: The role of dimethylguanidino valeric acid (DMGV)-related metabolic pathways in carbohydrate and lipid metabolism
statement.summary: Dimethylguanidino valeric acid (DMGV), including isomers ADGV and SDGV, is an emerging risk factor for metabolic syndrome (MetS) and has garnered research attention. However, the unavailability of DMGV commercial standards poses challenges for its mechanism study and potential clinical application. This PhD project aimed to synthesize DMGV standards with high purity, determine its absolute concentrations in healthy subjects and MetS patients, and evaluate its potential as a clinical biomarker. Additionally, we attempted to investigate the functional roles of DMGV in the occurrence and development of MetS to provide insights into novel intervention strategies.
